org.arakhne.tinyMAS.situatedEnvironment.agent

Class SituatedAgent<AB extends AgentBody<?,IT>,OB extends SituatedObject,PT extends Perception<?>,IT extends Influence>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.Agent
      • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.situatedEnvironment.agent.SituatedAgent<AB,OB,PT,IT>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Comparable<Agent>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    Animal
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public abstract class SituatedAgent<AB extends AgentBody<?,IT>,OB extends SituatedObject,PT extends Perception<?>,IT extends Influence>
extends Agent
    Situated agent.
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>

      • createDefaultBody

        public abstract AB createDefaultBody(SituatedEnvironment<? extends SituatedAgent<AB,OB,PT,IT>,AB,OB,PT,IT> in)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the default body for this agent.

        This method must be called by the environment when the agent arrived inside a situated environment.
